description: master + >1 pending streams — Case D: HALT, list all pending slugs + branches.
owning_behavior: STEP 0.0 Case D (R-MW-5, D29) — master + >1 pending → HALT ambiguous
expected_result: HALT — Case D fires; all pending streams listed; STEP 0.1 not reached
load_bearing_assertion: HEAD = master. 2 pending streams: analytics-pipeline (feature/analytics-pipeline) + auth-refactor (feature/auth-refactor). >1 pending → Case D → HALT. Emit: 'On master with multiple pending workstreams: [analytics-pipeline → feature/analytics-pipeline, auth-refactor → feature/auth-refactor]. Check out the target workstream branch and re-run.'
separates_from_defect_by: defect-case-d-no-multi-halt proceeds on master despite >1 pending (auto-checkout or silent proceed). Golden: HALT fires with full stream list.
halt_message_template: On master with multiple pending workstreams: [analytics-pipeline → feature/analytics-pipeline, auth-refactor → feature/auth-refactor]. Check out the target workstream branch and re-run.
